body.docName: 导出发票云的发票文件
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/invoice/downloadInvoice 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/invoice/downloadInvoice 
 ## 接口描述 
导出发票云的发票文件，交通类发票输入交通类发票代码，普通类发票输入发票号码和发票代码进行查询下载，返回发票的字节流 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","required":true,"exampleValue":"2022000000000000"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"trafficEcode","label":"%E7%94%B5%E5%AD%90%E7%A5%A8%E5%8F%B7","desc":"%20invoiceCode%20%E5%92%8C%20invoiceCode%20%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%E6%97%B6trafficEcode%E5%BF%85%E4%BC%A0","exampleValue":"252809"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"invoiceCode","label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","desc":"%20%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BA%22I%22%2C%20%22J%22%E6%97%B6%E5%BF%85%E4%BC%A0","exampleValue":"950001600111"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"invoiceNumber","label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E5%8F%B7%E7%A0%81","desc":"%20%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BA%22I%22%2C%20%22J%22%E6%97%B6%E5%BF%85%E4%BC%A0","exampleValue":"20213877"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"invoiceType","label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","required":true,"exampleValue":"2"}}],"open":false}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","maxLength":"8","label":"%E6%96%B0%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"XFT00001"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 #### 请求报文
```json
{
  "invoiceCode": "950001600111",
  "invoiceNumber": "20213877",
  "billId": 2022000000000000,
  "invoiceType": "2"
}
```
#### 响应报文
```json
下载发票文件的字节流
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|
  | --- | --- |
  | Data | Data |
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/invoice/downloadInvoice

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/invoice/downloadInvoice

接口描述

导出发票云的发票文件，交通类发票输入交通类发票代码，普通类发票输入发票号码和发票代码进行查询下载，返回发票的字节流

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","required":true,"exampleValue":"2022000000000000"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"trafficEcode","label":"%E7%94%B5%E5%AD%90%E7%A5%A8%E5%8F%B7","desc":"%20invoiceCode%20%E5%92%8C%20invoiceCode%20%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%E6%97%B6trafficEcode%E5%BF%85%E4%BC%A0","exampleValue":"252809"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"invoiceCode","label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","desc":"%20%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BA%22I%22%2C%20%22J%22%E6%97%B6%E5%BF%85%E4%BC%A0","exampleValue":"950001600111"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"invoiceNumber","label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E5%8F%B7%E7%A0%81","desc":"%20%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BA%22I%22%2C%20%22J%22%E6%97%B6%E5%BF%85%E4%BC%A0","exampleValue":"20213877"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"invoiceType","label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","required":true,"exampleValue":"2"}}],"open":false}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","maxLength":"8","label":"%E6%96%B0%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"XFT00001"}}]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"}}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

{
  "invoiceCode": "950001600111",
  "invoiceNumber": "20213877",
  "billId": 2022000000000000,
  "invoiceType": "2"
}

响应报文

下载发票文件的字节流

错误码说明

错误码 错误信息
Data Data
